calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-18-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Parties were sworn prior to the commencement of the hearing.

Petitioner: Emelina Cuadra appeared with Counsel Judy Hitchcock of Legal Assistance to the Elderly. Ms. Cuadra was assisted in English/Spanish translation by her Son, Edward Samayoa, who was sworn to translate to the best of his ability.

Respondent: Paige Thomas was not present.

Petitioner was sworn prior to the commencement of the hearing.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 50 yards away from the protected person: Emelina Cuadra and her Residence.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Molest, Attack, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Threaten, Harass, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail or e-Mail, Take Any Action, Directly or Through Others, to Obtain the Addresses or Locations of the Protected Persons.

No guns or other firearms.

Expires August 18, 2013.

Order signed in open court.
